§6BSCCO§f

§aBismuth Strontium Calcium Copper Oxide — a superconducting alloy for the particle accelerator and plasma forge!§f

§bBSCCO§f (Bismuth Strontium Calcium Copper Oxide) is a mid-to-late game alloy used primarily as dense superconducting wire. It enables the Large BSCCO Coil, a high-tier particle accelerator coil (min range 7,500, max 15,000).

§6Production§f (§bCrucible§f):
§b• 2× Bismuth§f (nuggets)
§b• 2× Strontium§f (nuggets)
§b• 2× Calcium§f (nuggets)
§b• 3× Copper§f (nuggets)
§b→ §e1 BSCCO Ingot§f

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• §eLarge BSCSO Coil§f — Assembly: 64× Dense BSCCO Wire + 64× Polymer Bar → coil for particle accelerator
§b• §eSolid State Quantum Processor§f — for quantum computer and quantum processing unit
§b• §ePlasma Forge§f — Welded Technetium Steel + Dense BSCCO Wire + Cast Bismuth Bronze + Versatile Circuit Board
§b• §eHeavy Magnetic Storage Tank§f
§b• §eQuantum Battery§f
§b• §eGerald the Construction Android§f

§eTip§f: BSCCO is the §ebottleneck for the particle accelerator§f — without it, you cannot build the BSCCO coils needed for end-game particle recipes. Prioritize automating bismuth, strontium, and calcium production before scaling up!
